document.name: Service Crosswalk: Heritage Gold → LAWIM V2
document.description: Complete semantic crosswalk of all Heritage Gold service concepts to LAWIM V2 equivalents

entries.notes: Visibility boost for 7 days. V2 Property model has no boost_level field. Requires new Prisma model or field extension.
entries.recommendation: Add boost_level and boost_expires_at to Property model; implement boost purchase flow via payments API.

entries.notes: Same concept as boost_7j with 30-day duration. Should be modeled as a configuration variant.
entries.recommendation: Implement as same boost system as boost_7j with duration parameter.

entries.notes: Premium listing with maximum visibility. Distinct from boost — affects ranking and presentation.
entries.recommendation: Add is_premium field to Property; implement premium ranking boost in matching engine.

entries.notes: Monthly agent subscription. V2 Organization model has no subscription linkage.
entries.recommendation: Implement Subscription model linked to Organization/User with billing via Campay.

entries.notes: LAWIM agent accompanies client on property visit. Requires visit scheduling + agent assignment.
entries.recommendation: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='visit_accompaniment' linked to Conversation.

entries.notes: Full transaction accompaniment from offer to signature. Same price as visit accompaniment.
entries.recommendation: Implement as ServiceOrder with type='transaction_accompaniment' with more complex fulfillment.

entries.notes: Document verification service (title deeds, permits, etc.). Price suggests automated check.
entries.recommendation: Defer to later phase; requires document upload and verification workflow.

entries.notes: V2 Media model supports photo storage/URLs but not professional photography service ordering.
entries.recommendation: Extend Media with service order origin tracking.

entries.notes: V2 Media model supports video but no professional video production service.
entries.recommendation: Defer; higher price suggests professional production, not just upload.

entries.notes: Property verification service. Heritage has verification_status field on properties.
entries.recommendation: Add verification_status and verified_at to Property; implement verification as ServiceOrder.

entries.notes: Pay-per-connection. Core LAWIM monetization. 500 FCFA = default lead price. Agent opt-in flow required.
entries.recommendation: Implement LeadPurchase model + agent credit system. This is the single most important monetization mechanism.

entries.notes: Personalized assistance. Same price as accompaniment services. May overlap.
entries.recommendation: Clarify distinction from accompagnement services before implementing.

entries.notes: Premium visibility at 7 500 FCFA. Distinct from boost (2 000/5 000) and premium_listing (10 000). Unclear differentiation.
entries.recommendation: Requires human decision to determine distinct semantics vs boost/premium_listing.

real_estate_services.family: Real Estate Service Matrices — 24 SVC- Matrices

entries.notes: Property estimation/valuation service. High priority — feeds directly into pricing and matching.
Professional expertise/inspection. More comprehensive than estimation.
Document verification. Linked to controle_documentaire monetized service.
V2 Conversation model links user ↔ property but has no visit scheduling or accompaniment tracking.
Second visit. Same infrastructure as visite_property. Distinction is follow-up visit.
Rental management service. Complex recurring service outside current V2 scope.
Property listing for rent. V2 Property model covers creation but not the service of listing.
Property listing for sale. Same as mise_en_location but buy transaction.
Publication/publishing service. V2 Property has publishedAt but no publication workflow.
Photography service. V2 Media stores photos but has no service ordering.
Video service. Similar to photographie.
Drone photography/videography. Specialized sub-service.
Home staging for property presentation.
Renovation service. V2 Project model can represent renovation projects generically.
Construction service. V2 Project model can represent construction projects generically.
Exact role match. Heritage Gold uses 'agent_immobilier', V2 uses 'real_estate_agent'. V2 has no qualification matrix — just a role label.
Heritage distinguishes individual agent vs agency. V2 uses one 'real_estate_agent' role for both.
Heritage 'notaire' → V2 'notary'. Semantic equivalent, different language.
Heritage 'geometre' → V2 'surveyor'.
Exact match in name and semantics.
Heritage 'ingenieur_genie_civil' (civil engineer) → V2 'engineer' (general). V2 is broader.
Heritage 'technicien_batiment' (building technician) → V2 'technician' (general).
Masonry professional. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Exact match.
Exact match.
Carpenter/joiner. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Painter. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Tiler. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Roofer. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Real estate expert. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Property evaluator/appraiser. Distinction from expert_immobilier is unclear.
Heritage 'gestionnaire_immobilier' → V2 'property_manager'.
Condo/co-ownership manager. Not in V2.
Heritage 'photographe_immobilier' (real estate photographer) → V2 'photographer' (general).
Drone videographer. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Heritage 'demenageur' → V2 'mover'.
Heritage 'entreprise_nettoyage' (cleaning company) → V2 'cleaner' (individual).
Security/guard services. Not in V2.
Heritage 'assureur' → V2 'insurer'.
Heritage 'banque_microfinance' (bank/microfinance) → V2 'bank' (generic). V2 also has 'financing' role.
Broker/intermediary. Not in V2 business_profiles.py.
Administrative service provider. Not in V2.
Single lead purchase at 500 FCFA. Core monetization unit. Heritage Gold default lead price.
Bulk lead pack: 5 contacts at 300 FCFA/lead (40% discount vs bronze).
Bulk lead pack: 15 contacts at 200 FCFA/lead (60% discount vs bronze).
Pay to unlock owner contact details. 500 FCFA — same price as single lead. Different mechanism.
Premium seeker profile with priority visibility. 1 000 FCFA.
Diaspora tier: access to verified properties. Feature flag diaspora_services=OFF.
Diaspora tier: accompaniment + reports. Mid-tier diaspora offering.
Diaspora tier: full accompaniment. 75 000 FCFA. Premium tier.

critical_gaps.title: No Service or ServiceCatalog Prisma model
critical_gaps.v2_impact: Cannot store, price, or order services
critical_gaps.suggested_approach: Add Service and ServiceOrder Prisma models

critical_gaps.title: No active payment processing
critical_gaps.v2_impact: Feature flag payments=OFF; API endpoints exist but unused
critical_gaps.suggested_approach: Enable Campay integration, activate payments feature flag

critical_gaps.title: No agent credit or lead purchase system
critical_gaps.v2_impact: Core monetization of matching is absent

critical_gaps.title: No service order lifecycle
critical_gaps.v2_impact: No fulfillment tracking for any service
critical_gaps.suggested_approach: Extend Project model with service-specific semantics and states

critical_gaps.title: No boost or premium listing system
critical_gaps.v2_impact: No paid visibility options for property listings
critical_gaps.suggested_approach: Add boost_level, boost_expires_at, is_premium to Property model

phase_1_immediate: Add Service and ServiceOrder Prisma models
Activate payments feature flag + enable Campay integration
Implement agent credit system (AgentCredit, LeadPurchase models)
Create basic ServiceCatalog with Heritage Gold pricing tiers
phase_2_short_term: Add boost_level, boost_expires_at, is_premium fields to Property model
Extend Project model with service order lifecycle (service_type, service_status, fulfillment tracking)
phase_3_medium_term: Add 10 missing professional roles to business_profiles.py
Implement top 4 real estate service matrices (visite, contre-visite, mise_en_location, estimation)
phase_4_long_term: Rating and review system for completed services
Drone, home staging, renovation, construction services
Complete professional service qualification matrices (27 PRO- matrices)
